title: Build a REST API with Express

message.text: Help me build a REST API using Express.js and TypeScript. I want endpoints for managing users.

response.text:
I'll help you build a REST API with Express.js and TypeScript. Let me start by reading your project structure.

Here's a plan:
1. Set up Express with TypeScript
2. Create user model and routes
3. Add middleware for validation
4. Set up error handling

value.value:
I can see your project is starting fresh. Let me set up the full Express + TypeScript structure for you.

First, let's install the dependencies:

```bash
npm install express cors helmet
npm install -D typescript @types/express @types/node ts-node
```

Now let me create the main application file:

message.text: Great! Now create the user routes file with CRUD operations.

value.value:
I've created `src/routes/users.ts` with full CRUD operations:

| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| GET | `/users` | List all users |
| GET | `/users/:id` | Get user by ID |
| POST | `/users` | Create new user |
| PUT | `/users/:id` | Update user |
| DELETE | `/users/:id` | Delete user |

Now let me wire up the routes in the main app file:

message.text: Can you run the tests to make sure everything works?

content.text:
PASS src/__tests__/users.test.ts
  User Routes
    ✓ GET /users returns empty array (23ms)
    ✓ POST /users creates a user (15ms)
    ✓ GET /users/:id returns user (8ms)
    ✓ DELETE /users/:id removes user (12ms)

Test Suites: 1 passed, 1 total
Tests:       4 passed, 4 total
Time:        1.247s

message.text: Search for any existing middleware files I might have.

content.text:
Found 0 files matching 'middleware' in src/

No existing middleware files found.

value.value:
No existing middleware files found. Would you like me to create some common middleware?

I can add:
- **Authentication middleware** - JWT token verification
- **Rate limiting** - Prevent API abuse
- **Request logging** - Log all incoming requests
- **Input validation** - Validate request bodies with Zod

Just let me know which ones you'd like!
